rules.title: Dematerialised promoter's securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoters' securities are not in dematerialised form.", remedy? := some "Ensure all promoter's specified securities are in dematerialised form before offer document filing."

rules.title: Fully paid-up equity shares or forfeiture
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Existing partly paid-up equity shares are not fully paid-up or forfeited."

rules.title: Firm arrangements of finance
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.finance_arrangements.some.isNone then "No firm arrangements of finance found." else "Firm arrangements of finance for less than 75% of the project's funding.", remedy? := some "Make firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals."

rules.title: Minimum holding period for equity shares offered for sale
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No minimum holding period specified for equity shares offered for sale."

rules.title: Holding period for convertible securities and resulting equity shares
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No convertible securities specified."

rules.title: Max sale unidentified targets
rules.failReason:
fun i => s!"Maximum sale of equity shares for unidentified acquisition or investment targets exceeds 25%.",
    remedy? := some "Adjust the maximum sale to not exceed 25%."

rules.title: Exceptions to max sale
rules.failReason: fun i => s!"No exceptions found for maximum sale limits."

rules.title: Additional conditions for conversion
rules.check: fun i => i.convertible_securities.all (fun cs => i.net_worth.contains cs && cs != i.fully_paid_up_equity_shares)
rules.failReason: fun i => s!"Convertible securities not issued out of free reserves and share premium, or issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits."

rules.title: Issuer may issue convertible debt instruments
rules.failReason: fun i => s!"Issuer in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for more than six months."

rules.title: Credit rating required for CDI offer
rules.failReason: fun i => s!"No credit rating obtained from at least one credit rating agency."

rules.title: Default payment of interest or repayment of principal
rules.failReason: fun i => "Issuer is in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount for a period of more than six months.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Credit rating and debenture trustee requirements
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.credit_rating then "No debenture trustee appointed." else "No credit rating obtained.", remedy? := some ""

rules.title: Debenture redemption reserve
rules.failReason: fun i => "No debenture redemption reserve created.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Consent for conversion of convertible debt instruments
rules.failReason: fun i => "No positive consent from holders for conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Option to not convert convertible portion into equity shares
rules.failReason: fun i => "No option provided for holders of listed convertible debt instruments to not convert the convertible portion into equity shares.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Warrant tenure ≤ 18 months
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Warrant tenure exceeds 18 months."

rules.title: Warrant exercise price formula and upfront payment
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Warrant exercise price not determined or upfront payment is zero."

rules.title: Forfeiture of consideration for un-exercised warrants
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Forfeiture of consideration for un-exercised warrants not applicable."

rules.title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20%
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoters' contribution is less than 20% of the post-issue capital."

rules.title: Promoter contribution by equity shares or convertible securities
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoter contribution method not specified."

rules.title: Undisclosed conversion price
rules.failReason: "Promoters did not contribute to the issue.", remedy? := some "Contribute to the public issue."

rules.title: Computation of promoter's contribution and weighted average price
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations not directly representable in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.check: fun i => i.securities_ineligible.all (fun x => x < i.lock_in_period || x >= i.lock_in_period + 1)
rules.failReason: "Some securities are ineligible for minimum promoters' contribution.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the specified securities acquired during the preceding three years comply with the regulation."

rules.title: Promoters’ contribution computation
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations not directly representable in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Exercise of employee stock options or SARs
rules.failReason: "The rule requires complex computations not directly representable in the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired by promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.length > 0 && i.securities_held_by_promoters.exists (fun s => s == fst i.specified_securities)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not found in securities held by promoters.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the specified securities are included in the list of securities held by promoters."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities acquired under Companies Act
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.length > 0 && i.securities_held_by_promoters.exists (fun s => s == fst i.specified_securities) && i.finance_arrangements.exists (fun f => f == 230 || f == 231 || f == 232 || f == 233 || f == 234)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not found in finance arrangements or not acquired under Companies Act.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the specified securities are acquired under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act and included in the list of finance arrangements."

rules.title: Payment for specified securities in government company IPO
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.length > 0 && i.finance_arrangements.exists (fun f => f == 235)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not found in finance arrangements or not part of government company IPO.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the specified securities are included in the list of finance arrangements and represent an initial public offer for a government company."

rules.title: Specified securities allotted to promoters at a price less than issue price
rules.check: fun i => i.specified_securities.length > 0 && i.securities_held_by_promoters.exists (fun s => let p = i.upfront_payment in s == fst i.specified_securities && p < snd i.specified_securities)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not found in securities held by promoters or allotted at a price greater than the issue price.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the specified securities are allotted to promoters at a price less than the issue price."

rules.title: Lock-in of specified securities held by the promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.securities_held_by_promoters.exists (fun s => let lp = i.lock_in_period in 0 < lp && lp <= 3 * i.min_holding_period)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Lock-in period for specified securities held by promoters is not within the valid range.", remedy? := some "Ensure that the lock-in period for specified securities held by promoters is between 1 and 3 times the minimum holding period."

rules.title: Lock-in period for promoter contribution
rules.failReason: if (i.lock_in_period != some 18) then "Lock-in period for promoter contribution is not 18 months." else if (i.finance_arrangements.contains 1) && (i.lock_in_period != some 3) then "Lock-in period for promoter contribution is not 3 years when majority of issue proceeds are proposed for capital expenditure.", remedy? := some "Adjust lock-in period for promoter contribution according to the regulation."

rules.title: Lock-in period for promoter excess holding
rules.failReason: if (i.lock_in_period != some 6) then "Lock-in period for promoter excess holding is not 6 months." else if (i.finance_arrangements.contains 1) && (i.lock_in_period != some 12) then "Lock-in period for promoter excess holding is not 1 year when majority of issue proceeds are proposed for capital expenditure.", remedy? := some "Adjust lock-in period for promoter excess holding according to the regulation."

rules.title: Lock-in of equity shares held by persons other than promoters
rules.failReason: if (i.lock_in_period != some 6) then "Lock-in period for equity shares held by persons other than promoters is not 6 months."

rules.title: Exceptions to lock-in for equity shares held by employees and employee stock option trusts
rules.failReason: "This rule does not apply to the provided Issuer structure."

rules.title: Lock-in for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds
rules.failReason: if (i.lock_in_period != some 6) then "Lock-in period for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds is not 6 months." else if (i.specified_securities.contains 3 && i.lock_in_period == 0) then "Lock-in period for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds should be greater than zero."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (a)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x.1 == 1) && i.lead_manager_roles.isSome
rules.failReason: fun i => "Locked-in specified securities not found or no lead manager roles provided.", remedy? := some "Provide locked-in specified securities and lead manager roles."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities (b)
rules.check: fun i => i.locked_in_securities.length > 0 && i.locked_in_securities.all (fun x => x.1 == 2)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Locked-in specified securities not found or no lead manager roles provided.", remedy? := some "Provide locked-in specified securities and lead manager roles."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities
rules.failReason: fun i => "Locked-in specified securities not found.", remedy? := some "Provide locked-in specified securities."

rules.title: Transfer of locked-in specified securities
rules.failReason: "This rule cannot be checked with the available Issuer fields.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Rights, obligations and responsibilities of lead managers
rules.failReason: fun i => "No lead manager roles provided.", remedy? := some "Provide lead manager roles."

issuer_questions.question: What is the net tangible assets?
What are the operating profits for the last 3 years?
What is the net worth for the last 3 years?
Is the dematerialised form of promoter's securities available?
Are all existing partly paid-up equity shares fully paid-up or forfeited?

What are the firm arrangements of finance towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the issue proceeds, excluding the amount to be raised through the proposed public issue or through existing identifiable internal accruals?
What is the minimum holding period for equity shares offered for sale?
Which convertible securities are being offered for sale?
What is the maximum percentage of funds raised for unidentified acquisition or investment targets?
Which securities are convertible?
What is the net worth of the issuer?
Is the issuer in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount?
Has the issuer been in default of payment for more than six months?
Has the issuer obtained a credit rating from at least one agency?
Who are the debenture trustees appointed by the issuer?
Has the issuer created a debenture redemption reserve?
Have holders of optionally convertible debt instruments given positive consent for conversion?
What is the warrant tenure in months?
What is the formula for determining the exercise price of warrants?
What is the upfront payment amount?
What percentage of the post-issue capital do promoters contribute?
How does the promoter contribute (equity shares or convertible securities)?
How much will the promoters contribute?
Which securities are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution?
Which securities are subject to this rule?
What securities do the promoters hold?
What finance arrangements apply?
What is the lock-in period for promoter contribution?
What is the lock-in period for promoter excess holding?
What is the lock-in period for equity shares held by persons other than promoters?
Does the issuer have equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds?
